name: Apple-Ginger Chutney
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Tart apples (peel, core, and finely chop)
1/2 cup Preserved ginger in syrup (finely chop)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in a large pan and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and cook until thickened, about 1 hour.
4. Ladle into prepared jars and seal.
5. Allow to mature for at least 1 month before consuming.
